title: Legal Aid Agency Annual Report and Accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "The Legal Aid Agency (LAA) Annual Report and Accounts 2024 to 2025 details how the agency has performed over the year. It outlines how the LAA delivered against its strategic objectives and key performance indicators. It also sets out the agency’s financial performance during the year in comparison to 2023 to 2024.  The audited accounts include the statement of comprehensive net expenditure which provides:  summary of the agency’s costs and income over the past year statement of the agency’s financial position detailing assets and liabilities as at 31 March 2025  "
